name: 反派陰謀全盤覆滅
description: 蘇雲多年佈局一朝敗露，綁架失敗被捕，童黛和紀家被送進警局。所有暗線在最後一刻全部收網，觀眾積累的憤怒在此刻得到完全釋放。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Su Yun, you're under arrest for kidnapping and financial fraud... With all the things you've done. I know all about them. You won't be out for 40 or 50 years... No, it can't be.
